Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Designation Of A Pmq Witness And For Production Of Documents,
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David W. Ammons, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: City and County of San Francisco
Vanessa M. Spear, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: State of California

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED as Modified: Plaintiff City And County Of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Designation Of A PMQ Witness And For Production Of Documents is denied as it seeks to compel testimony regarding the reason for and the effect of changes to the indemnification language that the State has proposed as part of the current negotiations. The motion is granted as it seeks the production of documents relating to the work done by the City and by the State as no opposition has been made to those requests for production of documents.
MODIFICATION:
Modified to clarify that the production of documents does not include documents relating to the negotiation. =(EAH/612)
